race.comment: Competitive race to finish. Siding with the resuming BARBARIC LAD (2) who has won a jumpout leading in. His best form last campaign reads very well for this having chased home Astral Flame & Dirty Grin at his two runs at this track - both of whom would be favourite here. Don't love the draw but Zahra on and the pace looks strong enough for him to run over the top at each way odds. MRS IGLESIA (11) comes here off a good second placing at Ballarat, now dropping 2kg and drawn perfectly in barrier three. She's the fit horse who will take plenty of beating. SOUTHERN CRESCENT (12) is racing well, just missing in a good race two back and solid again last time at Ballarat. This suits. DEEPFLOAT DIVA (3) resumes. He's got a good overall record and can run well fresh with the peaks to win on his day.
